from __future__ import annotations

import logging

LOGGER = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def retry_loop_logs_without_attempt_count_or_backoff_context_negative() -> None:
    backoffs = [1, 2, 4]
    for attempt, delay in enumerate(backoffs, start=1):
        LOGGER.warning("retry attempt=%s backoff_seconds=%s", attempt, delay)
